Elisa’s control to surrender arc begins; she hides a secret fire that foreshadows rebellion.  Memory’s volatility is introduced via glass fruit.  Grief surfaces as a shared loss among the agents.  Ambition is shown in competitive manuscript edits.

The group’s rivalry turns into a direct confrontation.
